hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Unknown

aries.general: Today brings new adventures your way. Be open to taking risks.
aries.love: Expect a playful surprise from your partner that rekindles the spark.
aries.career: Collaboration is the key today; engage with your colleagues for better results.

taurus.general: A day for grounding yourself. Take time to reflect on your goals.
taurus.love: Communicate openly with loved ones to strengthen your bond.
taurus.career: Patience will pay off; focus on the details in your work.

gemini.general: Your social life will thrive today. Embrace the connections around you.
gemini.love: A conversation with a loved one will bring clarity and understanding.
gemini.career: Share your ideas freely; you might inspire others and spark innovation.

cancer.general: Emotional insights will guide your decisions today, trust your intuition.
cancer.love: An old flame might resurface; be open to what that might mean.
cancer.career: Seek feedback from peers; it will help you grow and improve your work.

leo.general: This is a day to shine, embrace your creativity and show the world your talents.
leo.love: A grand gesture will brighten up your romantic life.
leo.career: Your leadership skills will be appreciated; take charge and inspire others.

virgo.general: Getting organized will bring you peace of mind today.
virgo.love: Take time to appreciate the little things in your relationship.
virgo.career: Focus on your efficiency; small improvements can lead to big results.

libra.general: Balance will be essential today; seek harmony in all areas of your life.
libra.love: Your charm will attract someone special; don't be afraid to make the first move.
libra.career: Negotiations will be favorable; advocate for your needs.

scorpio.general: Embrace your inner strength and don’t shy away from challenges.
scorpio.love: Deep conversations will deepen your connections today.
scorpio.career: Your passion will shine through your work; let it inspire others.

sagittarius.general: Adventure is calling; seek out experiences that expand your horizons.
sagittarius.love: Exciting plans with a partner will bring closeness.
sagittarius.career: Use your thirst for knowledge to advance your professional skills.

capricorn.general: Focus on long-term goals today; your hard work will start to pay off.
capricorn.love: Building a solid foundation in your relationship will yield lasting happiness.
capricorn.career: Associating with influential people will benefit your career.

aquarius.general: Innovation and creativity will be your allies today; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Surprising your partner with a spontaneous date will lift their spirits.
aquarius.career: Teamwork is essential; collaborate to create something amazing.

pisces.general: Tune into your emotional side, and don't hesitate to express your feelings.
pisces.love: Your empathy will strengthen your relationships today.
pisces.career: Focus on your creative projects; your artistic side will flourish.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

motivation.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
motivation.author: Norman Vaughan

motivation.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
motivation.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: It's not whether you get knocked down, it's whether you get up.
motivation.author: Vince Lombardi

captions.text: Every day is a second chance.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make today so awesome that yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Stay patient and trust your journey.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Technology is nothing. What's important is that you have a faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Humanity is acquiring all the right technology for all the wrong reasons.
tech.author: R. Buckminster Fuller

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

fun.text: The best jokes are the ones that make you think.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Life is short, smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I am on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me beach wallpapers.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: If we weren’t meant to eat midnight snacks, why is there even a light in the fridge?
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Doubt is a pain too lonely to know that faith is his twin brother.
faith.author: Khalil Gibran

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie ten Boom

faith.text: Keep the faith. The most amazing things in life tend to happen right at the moment you're about to give up hope.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith doesn’t make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Take the first step in faith. You don’t have to see the whole staircase, just take the first step.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Being wise means being able to recognize what is important.
wisdom.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The wise man does not lay up his own treasures. The more he gives to others, the more he has for himself.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you would have preferred to talk.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: The simple things are also the most extraordinary things, and only the wise can see them.
wisdom.author: Paulo Coelho

wisdom.text: It is the mark of an educated mind to be able to entertain a thought without accepting it.
wisdom.author: Aristotle
